title: Icy Crunchy Australian Fish Burger
description: A refreshing twist on the classic burger featuring umeboshi, a sweet glaze, and crunchy slaw.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium-high heat to 180°C.
In a shallow dish, mix together panko breadcrumbs and a pinch of salt.
Dip the soy-glazed Barramundi fillets in the panko mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Add a small amount of oil to the preheated pan and sear the fish for 3-4 minutes per side, until cooked through.
In a separate pan, toast the Korean chili flakes over low heat for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.

Assemble the burgers by spreading a dollop of Australian bush tomato aioli on the bottom bun, followed by a cooked fish fillet, a slice of umeboshi pickled daikon, a spoonful of Australian sweet potato slaw, and finally the top bun.
Drizzle the glaze over the fish and serve immediately.
Garnish with a sprig of iceberg lettuce and serve with a side of toasted panko breadcrumbs.
